name: io.github.TourAround/lystbot
description: Smart lists that your AI can actually use. Manage lists via MCP, CLI, or REST API.

tools.name: get_list
tools.description: Get a specific list with items

tools.name: add_items
tools.description: Add one or more items to a list

tools.name: remove_item
tools.description: Remove an item from a list

tools.name: clear_checked
tools.description: Remove all checked (completed) items from a list

tools.name: share_list
tools.description: Generate a share code for a list

tools.name: join_list
tools.description: Join a shared list via code

tools.name: move_item
tools.description: Move an item to a category (or Other)
